rationale: Educ. Code §45.0531 governs the Permanent School Fund bond guarantee reserve percentage. It does not reference or depend on the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: the board by rule may establish a percentage of the cost value of the permanent school fund to be reserved from use in guaranteeing bonds under this subchapter.
_note: No textual or operational link between the homestead exemption amount and the PSF reserve provisions in this section.
